source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A rectangular piece of paper $F G H I$ with sides of length $4 \mathrm{~cm}$ and $16 \mathrm{~cm}$ is folded along the line $M N$ so that the vertex $G$ coincides with the vertex $I$ as shown. The outline of the paper now makes a pentagon $F M N H^{\prime} I$. What is the area, in $\mathrm{cm}^{2}$, of the pentagon $F M N H^{\prime} I$ ? <image1>
